entry.title: Datasphere - Data Integration "Used Execution Hours" - details
entry.content:
Hello,

How can I get details on which replication flows contributed to the "Used Execution Hours" under the Data Integration section in the menu: System -> Configuration -> Tenant Configuration

I checked table  TASK_LOGS_V_EXT and the DURATION ( in seconds) for REPLICATION_HOURS does not seem to add up to what I am seeing in "Used Execution Hours"

 

 

Thanks,

Hiri

entry.title: Re: F4 help for Application Job in Public Cloud (2502 release)
entry.content: Helpful thanks for sharing..

entry.title: Re: Determination of payment terms in Condition Contract?
entry.content:
Hi @roberto_t,

In SAP Condition Contracts (WCOCO), the Payment Terms field serves as a default for the specific agreement. However, in standard SAP CCM behavior, the Payment Terms field remains blank in the Settlement Document, unless explicitly maintained in the Condition Contract.

If you need to always capture the one in the BP master data, I recommend determining the Payment Terms dynamically at the time of Settlement Document creation. You can configure this in the Settlement Process Configuration by adjusting the relevant settings.

Would you like guidance on the exact configuration steps? Let me know how I can assist further!

Best regards,
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Add n number of days to a date field in Compensation
entry.content:
I would like to check if there is a way to add n number of days to a date and calculate the new date and show in the compensation worksheet.

For ex 10/01/2024 i need to add 365 days and show as 09/30/2025 

Scenario:  Basically, for employees who have not completed 1 year of service the bonus payout would be based on 1 year of service hence i need to calculate the 1 year completion date and post this date to EC.

Regards

Vivek

entry.title: Re: Program item is not recording when it's completed out...
entry.content: Ok. It looks like the item completion is from before the program assignment. If that's the case, if you change the item completion to a date after the program assignment, does that complete the item in the program?

entry.title: Re: Upload Attachments in SuccessFactors Using OData API and Integration Suite: A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content:
Hi! 

If my MDF have 3-4 attachment fields and I want to upload by API in single call the 3-4 attachments field, I can follow the same process? or is not supported and I have to make a single call for each attachment?

entry.title: SAP HANA Rev 59.16: Driving Innovation with Enhanced Performance, Security, and Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi SAP HANA Experts, 

I want to create a blog in the portala for powerful in-memory data platform, continues to evolve and play a crucial role in the digital transformation journey for businesses worldwide. The latest release, SPS 05, which reached Revision 59.16 on January 7, 2025, brings a wealth of new features and enhancements aimed at improving performance, security, cloud integration, and user experience. Let’s take a closer look at what’s new in this release and how businesses can benefit from it.

  1. Enhanced Performance and Speed

SAP HANA consistently focuses on improving its core performance, and the Rev 59.16 release continues this trend with significant advancements:

  • Optimized Query Processing: The speed of query execution has been significantly boosted, thanks to improvements in internal memory management. This ensures faster response times, even with complex workloads.
  • Improved Data Tiering: Better data tiering now allows SAP HANA to efficiently manage hot, warm, and cold data. This results in improved system performance, particularly for organizations dealing with massive volumes of data.

These enhancements ensure SAP HANA remains a high-performance solution for real-time analytics, no matter the scale or complexity of the data involved.

  1. Cloud Integration and Hybrid Enhancements

As businesses increasingly embrace hybrid and multi-cloud environments, Rev 59.16 makes it easier for SAP HANA to integrate with various cloud platforms:

  • Cloud-Native Capabilities: The release introduces enhanced cloud-native features, allowing businesses to seamlessly run SAP HANA applications both on-premise and in the cloud, offering greater flexibility.
  • SAP HANA Cloud Integration: Stronger integration tools simplify bridging on-premise SAP HANA with SAP HANA Cloud, creating a smoother hybrid cloud experience and enabling efficient management of data across multiple environments.

These features support a more unified, efficient, and scalable cloud experience for businesses managing their data in a hybrid or multi-cloud infrastructure.

  1. Security Improvements

SAP HANA Rev 59.16 prioritizes enhanced security, addressing the growing concerns around data protection and compliance:

  • Enhanced Data Encryption: Stronger encryption features have been introduced to safeguard sensitive data both in transit and at rest. This ensures that businesses meet stringent security and compliance standards, particularly in industries with high data sensitivity.
  • Stronger Authentication: The system now supports a wider array of authentication protocols, improving access control and security for both users and services interacting with SAP HANA.

These security upgrades ensure that SAP HANA remains a trusted platform for businesses dealing with highly sensitive data and regulatory requirements.

  1. AI and Machine Learning Integration

SAP HANA has also made significant strides in integrating AI and machine learning capabilities, making it easier for businesses to harness the power of advanced analytics:

  • Streamlined AI Integration: The new release enhances integration with AI and machine learning frameworks, enabling businesses to run predictive models directly on their SAP HANA data. This reduces the time between data collection and actionable insights, allowing organizations to make smarter decisions faster.
  • Graph Data Processing: The expansion of graph data processing allows businesses to analyze complex relationships within their data more effectively. This feature is especially valuable in sectors like finance and telecommunications, where understanding intricate data relationships is critical.

These capabilities enable organizations to leverage the full potential of their data and unlock deeper insights using AI and machine learning.

  1. Improved Application Development

For developers working on SAP applications, Rev 59.16 introduces several new tools and features aimed at improving the development experience:

  • New Development Frameworks: The release includes additional development frameworks designed to speed up the application lifecycle, helping developers build and deploy applications more efficiently.

Thanks,

Divya Sahukari

entry.title: Issue with CS_SEC_EXTENDED_ENCRYPTION to CS_TRUE
entry.content:
Issues connecting to Sybase ASE 16.0 SP03 PL14 (on rhel 7.9) from SDK 16.0 SP04 PL06 (windows) having CS_SEC_EXTENDED_ENCRYPTION to CS_TRUE in the ocs.cfg 

when the above setting is enabled the connection hangs (using isql) and we did try to setup Ribo and that did not help us in anyway ,it was just existing without any response info back in the ribo txt files 

 

after setting CS_SEC_EXTENDED_ENCRYPTION to CS_FALSE the connection is established ,so any changes with this in recent ASE/SDK releases ???

@murata-a ,

There is a major upgrade for S/$ HANA Cloud Public Cloud during Feb. 14-16 weekend, to be Release 2502. Not for the weekend of Feb. 22.

If you are not clear about this email, please open a ticket to BTP ops to find out the details.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Contract Management - Delta Accruals for a fixed amount without Business Volume
entry.content:
Hi we have set up a contract for which there is no business volume for the first period of the contract say the first 10 days out of 100.

The contract is retrospective so we are generating delta accruals using a 7 day calendar.

When we run settlement to generate the delta accruals for the first 10 days it does not create any accrual then on the first day where there is business volume it creates an accrual for 11 days worth of accrual e.g fixed amoutn accrual of 1000 eur / 100 days *11 = Accrual on day 11 of 110.

Then for every subsequent day it will post an accrual of 10 EUR.

What we actually want is the accrual to be posted at 10 EUR per day for every day of the agreement.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
@PrakashGone 

I see that you had issues with the /T05 for Massachusetts populating and that SAP delivered a solution.  Would you mind sharing what that solution was?

We have a major issue with Massachusetts and have been back and forth with both SAP and BSI and still no solution.  We have applied all the notes that we have found or been told we need to apply and it still is not working.  We have employees that we cannot process in payroll because it's creating an astronomically high supplement tax and not allowing any benefit deductions to be taken in the payroll.

Appreciate any insight you can give us!

thanks,

Alicia

entry.title: Re: Contract Management - Delta Accruals for a fixed amou...
entry.content:
Hi @tim_parsons3,

In SAP Settlement Management, if you need to generate delta accruals for a retrospective Condition Contract but no business volume exists for the initial period, the best approach is to maintain a Settlement Material in the Settlement Data tab of the Condition Contract.

The system requires at least one material to create a Settlement Document. By maintaining a Settlement Material, the system will use it to calculate fixed amount when no business volume is available. Once business volume is recorded, the system will prioritize actual transactions over the Settlement Material.

Alternative Approach

If your accrual calculation does not need to be tied to business volume, you may consider using a Condition Contract that is not business volume-based. This can be achieved by not maintaining a Business Volume Profile for the respective Condition Contract Type.

Configuration Options

You can maintain the Settlement Material manually in each Condition Contract or configure it via the system settings (note that this configuration is not transportable).

Best regards,
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Dropshipment flow: exicises managment MM and SD
entry.content:
Dear experts,

our customer is using the dropshipment flow without issues. Now, a new requirement is coming. One company placed in USA needs to implement the payment of the excises into the PO and then in the customer billing. The supplier first pays in advance the excises to the California Government, the the customer pays the supplier and at the end the customer pays the company.

I have set up the surcharges condition in the SD and it is fine. I have problem on the MM side. I have followed some forum and I have created a statistical condition in the PO defined as freight. Then the amounts are posted both in the MIGO and in the MIRO. If I look to the FS10N GL account balance report I see a "strange" situation. I have the item of the MIGO and MIRO in "compensation" (sorry for the bas terms but I am not a FI consultant) and then I have the line of the customer not closed. The expection is to have in the FS10N GL account balance the amount 0 (for the accounts where the exices are posted). How can I close this item? Do you suggest another approach? I have also proposed to the customer to post directly the amount of excises in the MIRO under the GL account TAB. From an accounting point of view is fine (we have only MIRO and customer billing posistions that make the net in the balance) but the requirement is to not have manual activities.

Thanks a lot

Elena

entry.title: BI 4.3 SP04, SAML2, Entra and logout from IDP
entry.content: We have implemented SAML2 authentication with BI 4.3 and Microsoft Entra, using 2791348 document. I also tried to implement the logoff_redirect.htm page to make sure when user logs out of the BOE/BI, it logs them out of the IDP Entra also. The BI session in SAP is gone, but unfortunately I can't get the script working properly to logout the user from the IDP properly. Does anyone have a working script in logoff_redirect.htm?

entry.title: S/4 HANA Public Cloud - Custom CDS limit
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We must create a Custom CDS based on I_BILLINGDOCUMENTITEM. In our S/4 HANA Public Cloud System there will be half million data.

We what to know if there is a limit in data volume for Custom CDS View consumption exposed as Odata API.
There are some specific system limit? Data Volume limit or some Technical limit?
Do you suggest to consume the Odata API with filter or Top/Skip parameters?

 

KR.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Public Cloud - Custom CDS limit
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

We cannot tell an exact limit for CDS Views which are exposed as External APIs because it also depends a lot on the amount of columns that the CDS View is returning. 

However, if you already know that your Custom CDS View will return a big amount of data, we indeed suggest to consume the Odata API with Top/Skip parameters or with filters.

I have selected some documentations for you. Kindly check below:

  • 2929872 - Power BI tool throws runtime error TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED when running Custom CDS view
  • 2692128 - Runtime errors from CDS View ODATA Call - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • 2473735 - Odata Query Options
  • Using OData's $top, $skip and $count

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Call for Speakers for SIT Melbourne
entry.content:
Hi SAP Melbourne Community,
Happy New Year 2025, hope everyone had some well needed rest and relaxation.
We had an awesome 2024 with your support and looking forward to your continued support in 2025.

This post is a call for speakers.

If you would like to practice your presentation skills in a relaxed, friendly and supportive atmosphere look no further. I presented at the previous one and it felt great.

Following are the planned dates for 2025
19th Feb
23rd May
20th Aug
19th Nov

It's not too late, if you would like to present on 19th Feb as well.

Cheers,
SAP Melbourne Community

entry.title: Re: Test Automation Tool for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition – A Game Changer in the 3-System Land
entry.content:
Hi guys, please I'm doing my certification and I have a doubt in one question. Please, anyone can help me with the correct answer.

The question is:

Which of the following are capabilities of the test automation tool for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition? Select 2 alternatives.
1) Raises test defects automatically
2) Supports recording of transaction-based processes
3) Supports the creation od custom test automates
4) Captures test results with screenshot

In my opinion the correct answer is options 3 and 4. But I found another forum with the option 2 is correct too.
Please, anyone can help me with this question?

Thanks in advance.

Frank

entry.title: Re: What is shown under 'Latest replies'?
entry.content:
@Johan_Hakkesteegt @TuncayKaraca Finally an update here - we decided to redesign the SAP Managed tag page, and the new version is live now. 

The changes we have made are:

  1. Created one feed that can be filtered by content type and sorted by “Creation Date”, “Most Commented”, “Most Liked”, “Most Recent (activity)”, “Most Viewed”
  2. Added preview of the content under the title (previously it only showed the title)
  3. Removed the sidebar widgets on the right-hand side

entry.title: Re: Add n number of days to a date field in Compensation
entry.content:
Hi @vivekanandanp 

As far as I know there is no way to do this unfortunately. I believe there is a thread on this already on the community, I'll try to find it.

I do believe there is a function in business rules that does that however and might work with compensation eligibility rules (to be tested) but I guess here you are trying to do this in a column formula.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Has anyone experienced recording the GUI in Quartz theme? The user crashes on input data fields
entry.content: Hi, I have 2 users creating simulations in the GUI Quartz theme and when they captured field entries, it continues to crash.  They are using the Quartz theme profile.  When they change the profile to General Web they don't have issues but I think that will cause downstream issues.  It seemed they were able to record without issue last week.  Any advice would be appreciated!

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP - PostgreSQL SSH Tunnel and SSH Tunneling Explained
entry.content:
Hi @yogananda ,

thank you for this informative blog. I already have bound a Business Application Studio CAP application against the hyperscaler postgreSQL instance on SAP BTP successfully. The app is deployed but as soon as I try to call my exposed service endpoint, I get "Resource Timeout Issue". 

I also didn´t manage to connecto via DBeaver tool, I pasted the hostname, url, and password and also specified the SSL certificate but the connection fails. The ssh tunnel is something that I build via BAS terminal. But I have difficulties in the combination of the steps, it is still unclear for me. 

During start of the app via "cds watch --profile hybrid" in BAS, I noticed the following in the terminal: It connects not only with db>postgres, but also with db.sqlite although I took care via command "cds bind -2 "postgreInstance:postgreKey" command that it is bound against existing service and key. I also have my .cdsrc-private.json file with these settings and I start my app in hybrid runtime with BTP cloud bindings. 

[cds] - connect using bindings from: { registry: '~/.cds-services.json' }
[cds] - connect to db > postgres {
url: 'db.sqlite',
vcap: { name: 'MyPostgreSQL-Instance }, //example only, not real for this blog post!
credentials: { ssl: true },
username: '61fdd1993a12', //modified
password: '...',
hostname: 'postgres-e907e4e7-0d55-407b-ae9f-1deee445fba8.postgres.database.azure.com', //modified
dbname: 'vCPkjVeirgrU',
port: '5432',
uri: 'postgres://41fdc1893a13:e0e4c5a97ac6dcc17a96e0a79f3d3a0b@postgres-e807e4e7-0d55-407b-ae9f-1deee445fba9.postgres.database.azure.com:5432/vCPkjVeirgrU',
urls: {
api_server: 'https://api-backing-services.eu20-001.data.services.cloud.sap'
},
sslcert: '...',
sslrootcert: '...'
}

The error when requesting the service endpoint to a PostGreSQL based/deployed cds entity:

"error": {"code": "500","message": "ResourceRequest timed out"}}

You can kindly contact me if you can support via my mail: Rufat.Gadirov@jfs-digital.com

Thank you in advance.

Best regards

Rufat

entry.title: Re: Manage automatic propagation of changes from template...
entry.content:
Good day Remy,

Thank you for sharing your inquiry on the SAP Community Page.  To further support your request, additional information will be needed.  We ask that you create an SAP For Me case, using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password).  You will need to select the specific SAP Signavio product / component as in the example below: 

 
System: 
Search for SAP Signavio  
 
Product Area: 
SAP Signavio Process Manager > SAP Signavio Process Manager 
 
Component: 
BPI (Business Process Intelligence) 
---  
BPI-PI (SAP Signavio Process Insights) or 
BPI-SIG (SAP Business Transformation Suite by SAP Signavio) – Product & Topic 
 
If you need further information in regard to creating a case, you can find more details in the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center. 
 
Kind regards,
 
KantriceD

entry.title: Re: Add n number of days to a date field in Compensation
entry.content:
@vivekanandanp Here is some content I found from an internal SAP discussion (each bullet point is a different comment by a different person).

  • Is my understanding correct that there is no option to calculate dateDiff between 'Today' and custom date field in custom formula? If it's possible then how we can define 'Today'?
  • I would also want to know it this is possible in order to calculate the "Years of Service" that is commonly asked for by the clients I use "dateDiff(startDate,toDate('04/30/2021','MM/dd/yyyy'))/365" but they have to update the effective date each year
  • dateDiff(startDate,toDate(lookup("defaultDate",1,1),'MM/dd/yyyy'))/365.25 then they just need to update the lookup, which has one row: "*,'04/30/2021'". Divide by 365.25 to better handle leap years
  • yes, this is a workaround if we specify the date like '04/30/2021' as mentioned by (). But what if the Customer would like to have more precise calculation with 'Today'. I believe there is no option for that, isn't it?
  • Correct - we cannot use "Today"

entry.title: Best Practice Advice for Performance Forms
entry.content: We have just gone through our first performance cycle with SuccessFactors and are starting to think about the next one. Is it best practice to create a new form template for each performance cycle, or can we re-use the same template, update the settings and the route map? It seems very tedious to reconfigure the email notifications each time.

entry.title: Re: How to publish data from Comp info to Job info?
entry.content:
Hello @xavierlegarrec,

Answer: Yes, you are absolutely correct. Comp Admin is doing the changes once the worksheet is completed. That's why standard promotion pop up is not being used by planners/managers to publish back the final values individually.

Thanks for highlighting the reason where this custom approach is more useful.

Regards,

Farhan Danish

entry.title: Re: Has anyone experienced recording the GUI in Quartz th...
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm not sure of the exact reason for the issue so unless you manage to identify it soon it would be best to raise a support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-PRO and get support to have a detailed look at your issue.  If the Watchdog window is appearing when Producer crashes, which is a sign that Producer has a technical issue and not some other system closing Producer, it would good to attach the Watchdog log to your ticket.  This will help in identifying the problem.  To learn more about generating a detailed Watchdog log file, look at this KBA.

Regards
Shane

There is no path Service Instances > ABAP System > System > View Dashboard > Communication Management > Communication Systems in the Fiori Launchpad. All my apps are the following:

SAP BTP, ABAP environment

entry.title: Re: Unable to find SubTotal function in SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: SAP Logon 750 crashes to desktop without errors after...
entry.content:
I wasn't able to resolve the issue completely, but I found a workaround for emergency situations. Here’s what you can do:

  1. Open SAP Logon and switch the theme to one of the older themes.


  2. After changing the theme, you should be able to start a session using the following command:

 

"C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP\FrontEnd\SAPgui\sapshcut.exe" -system=XXX -client=XXX -user=xxxxxxxxxx -pw=xxxxxxxx -language=EN

 

I hope this helps someone!

entry.title: Re: Solution for Error “No business partner found for ERP partner (role:LF)”
entry.content: I am facing the same issue , however I am using embedded EWM and as per my understanding this solution is for only decentralized EWM. Please help me to fix this.

entry.title: Re: Should a rule also be created for outgoing payment fi...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Doug Heffernan would most likely ask Mentalo. But I would say: Yes, if you want to automate also the clearing and posting of outgoing payments, you should create outgoing payment processing rules.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEREPLICA | Z-fields cannot be updated
entry.content:
Hello Kurt

I believe your custom fields need to be passed as CHARACTER-fields in the "EXTENSIONIN(X)"-structures and the exact length / position over the entire structure needs to be defined ... The ABAP-Utility "CL_ABAP_CONTAINER_UTILITIES=>FILL_CONTAINER_C" can be used to facilitate that.

Check the documentation on the "EXTENSIONIN"-table via Trx. "SE37" for "BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEREPLICA" :
"Furthermore, the fields in the structures BAPI_TE_<NAME> can only be CHARACTER fields. ....
Parameters EXTENSIONIN and EXTENSIONINX are used for transferring data to the method. Field STRUCTURE contains the name of the structure (for example, BAPI_TE_MARA or BAPI_TE_MARAX). This names is used to identify the work area (for example,  WA_BAPI_TE_MARA or WA_BAPI_TE_MARAX) to which the data is transferred. The remaining fields in parameters EXTENSIONIN or EXTENSIONINX contain data for the key fields (for example, the material number) and the data for customer-specific fields. The number of characters reserved in both parameters for the contents of the customer-specific fields must match the number of characters for the relevant field in the work area. If the number of required characters is less, the remaining characters are left blank. Only when all characters have been filled can the contact for an additional field be transferred. Bear in mind that only data for which an appropriate indicator has been set in the work area can be updated to the database."

Another useful resource is SAP-Note 1650360 - BAPI: Length EXTENSION insufficient for cust-specific fields - SAP for Me

Hope this helps

Nic T.

entry.title: Re: Pick Outbound Delivery - Fiori APP
entry.content: I have same query, Would appreciate any response, should we enhance this app

entry.title: Re: Pick Outbound Delivery - deliveries containing items with batches
entry.content: I have same issue, what should we do, should we enhance odata service?

entry.title: Re: How to identify which roles have been assigned to a q...
entry.content:
Hello All,

To identify which role is assigned to specific query you can use below SQL statement (use fields OBJ_FROM, OBJ_TO).

 

SELECT DISTINCT 
	ROLES.AGR_NAME AS COMPOSITE_ROLE, 
	ROLES.CHILD_AGR AS SINGLE_ROLE, 
	UNAME AS USER, 
	ROLE_CONTENT.REPORT, 
	ROLE_CONTENT_QUERY.FIELD AS OBJ_TYPE, 
	ROLE_CONTENT_QUERY.LOW AS OBJ_FROM, 
	ROLE_CONTENT_QUERY.HIGH AS OBJ_TO
FROM AGR_AGRS AS ROLES
LEFT JOIN AGR_USERS AS USERS ON USERS.AGR_NAME = ROLES.AGR_NAME
LEFT JOIN AGR_HIER AS ROLE_CONTENT ON ROLE_CONTENT.AGR_NAME = ROLES.CHILD_AGR
LEFT JOIN AGR_1251 AS ROLE_CONTENT_QUERY ON ROLE_CONTENT_QUERY.AGR_NAME = ROLES.CHILD_AGR;

entry.title: Garnishment service charge needs to be sent to different vendor than the garnishment US Payroll
entry.content: There are a few states where the garnishment fee is not sent to the same vendor as the garnishment deduction. In NV, the fee is sent to an address in California. Is there a way to automatically deduct the $2 fee and send it to another vendor without creating another garnishment? There is nothing under 'Service Charges' in the IMG the shows me this can be done.

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Bangalore, India)

entry.title: Re: Customer is looking to automate Movement Type 309 to...
entry.content: I do not think there is a standard way to do it - you can look for a workflow option or set up a background job that runs daily and picks up 101 based on the certain conditions your client has.

entry.title: Re: How do we confirm a staffing on a work package?
entry.content:
Hi Santosh,

I am trying to replicate the same scenario as yours, I believe you can resolve it with the below steps,

Navigate to your project using plan customer projects app, then click on work packages tab and expand the work package by clicking on the > icon, in edit mode, after you assign a resource, there is a confirmed icon which is set to off by default, turn it on and the staffing will be confirmed.

entry.title: Story reports are not loading
entry.content: Story reports are not loading since this morning, is anyone else experiencing this issue?

entry.title: Re: OData Exploration with EPM Tutorial - ES5

entry.title: Extend Odata service for fiori app - Pick Outbound Delivery to include delivery with batches
entry.content:
I have a requirement to extend standard fiori app - Pick Outbound Delivery, in Odata service , there is a method DELIVERYHEADER_GET_ENTITY which has a logic to exclude deliveries with batches as per standard SAP code, now Can i enhance this odata service? I am unable to find business context for this app to enhance this app via Custom fields and logic (App Extensibility: Pick Outbound Delivery | SAP Help Portal) , please provide help.

Odata service - LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PICK

UI5 application - LE_SHP_PICKS1

entry.title: Re: Approve a document via Service Layer - SAP B1
entry.content: Hi! Is there a way to update the main "Remarks" field (OWDD."Remarks")? The "ApprovalRequestDecisions" method defines a "Remark" for the approval team, but how can I set the "Remark" for the requester? I used the PATCH https://localhost:50000/b1s/v1/ApprovalRequests(123) { "ApprovalRequestLines": [ { "StageCode": 3, "Status": "ardPending", "UserID": 1 } ], "CurrentStage": 3, "IsDraft": "Y", "ObjectEntry": 14, "ObjectType": "112", "OriginatorID": 38, "Remarks": "Please Approve, dear Master", "Status": "arsPending" } , but is not working, any ideas? Regards!

entry.title: Re: In SLT while generating Objects getting some error li...
entry.content:
Hi, @Harshada98!

I've found an SAP Note in the knowledge base that mentions the error message you reported:

  • 3212268 - SLT (DMIS 2011 / DMIS 2018) Source and Central System: Runtime objects generation fails due to statement truncation caused by long field names

And there's also a KBA that redirects to other SAP Notes:

  • 2944950 - The field is unknown, but there is a field with the similar name - DMIS 2011 SP15

Please, check if they're applicable to your system, and if yes, let me know if this solves the issue!

Best regards,
Caio

entry.title: LMS SF User Connector filter by Department
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have multiple business units in BizX and 1 business unit or Department wants to use LMS. If we were to configure the SF User Connector, is it possible to filter out only the department users I specify? I guess we can use the Integration Center, but want to know if this is possible with the standard SF User connector. 

TIA

entry.title: PowerDesigner Web Portal using JDBC to connect to repository on SQL Server
entry.content:
Hello,

Does anyone have experience implementing Web Portal with repository on SQL server via JDBC?   How does it work?   Did you have to use local SQL Server account?   Did you have to save username and password in repository xml?    Is there a way to use externally managed (domain) accounts and not saving username/password?   How?

Thank you!

entry.title: PCR for OT calculations
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Can someone help me writing a time PCR based on the below logic.

weekly schedule 3 working days and 4 day offs.

If the EE works any hours on day offs their hours should be calculated as 1,5x or 2.0x based on union agreement as below

If EE works upto 8 hours it should be 1.5x overtime

If EE works from 9 hours to 16 hours it should be 2.0x overtime

if EE works from 17 or more it should be 1.5x overtime,

entry.title: Ways to send data between ibp and bw4hana when using integration suite with cpi-ds
entry.content:
Hello fellow integrators!!!

Just looking out for a approach on an integration scenario for data flow from IBP system to cpi-ds to integration suite and then go bw4hana

 

 

The question is what are the ways to send data ( using file or  http protocol) and their limitations in general.

entry.title: Re: Condition Contract Settlement error: Tax code via pri...
entry.content:
Hi @anshuljoshi 

Delta accruals are not relevant for tax. Hence, you are not getting the error during delta accrual settlement creation. During the Rebate settlement for the Goods related Contract type, Tax code will be copied from the source documents from the business volume. This happens from the RETT condition type. If tax code is missing in business volume (this happens for of ECC documents transferred to S4 in case of Bulefield or brownfield implementation) then tax code is determined by AS01 condition type. Check if you have these two condition types in the Calculation Schema. If you want to suppress this error, you can do so in the Settlement Process type. "Handling of Missing Tax Code" field controls how to handle when the tax code is missing in the settlement document. Hope this help.

Regards

Hari

entry.title: Re: Integration Advisor - TPM Agreement: Handle Single So...
entry.content:
We addressed this issue by using a custom TPM mapping. Specifically, we checked the BGM D_1001 value for 220 or 81. This approach also proved useful when we needed to include 105 for Purchase Orders.

The output structure doesn’t have to be ORDERS05—in the case of Purchase Orders, we used PORDCR103. As long as the target IDoc payload is correctly structured, the specific output format doesn’t matter.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Melbourne 19th Feb 2025
entry.content: Who all can join ?

entry.title: Re: WB2R_SC - Settlement document that reduces business v...
entry.content:
Hi @marco19 

If I understood your requirement correctly, credit memo has to reduce the accruals (post negative accruals). 

In standard, Credit memos post the negative accruals for the value based (%) condition contracts. For the quantity-based rebate calculation this will not happen. This makes sense as there is no quantity transaction (there is no goods movement) for the credit memos. If you still need to proceed with the requirement, follow the instructions in OSS Note: 3433878 - Some fields are not updated in the business volume table VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1

Regards

Hari

entry.title: Re: How to create the default User Control and Superdba o...

entry.title: How to send email reminders before the due date of the invoice
entry.content:
We are currently utilizing dunning and dunning runs for past due invoices. We are wondering if its possible to send email reminders before the due date of the invoice. Say 15 days before the invoice is actually due. Since this is before the due date, it is my understanding that we cannot do that with dunning. What we are requesting can also be referred to as negative dunning. If an invoice is Net 60, we would like to send an email reminder to the account when the invoice is 15 days from net 60. So not due yet. Can you please help me locate instructions on how and where to set this up ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to send email reminders before the due date of th...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

You may kindly follow the steps below to generate dunning letters for not-due items.

  1. Go to Business Configuration work center.
  2. Go to Activities, search for Dunning Strategies.
  3. Click edit dunning strategies.
  4. Check : Include items not overdue flag.

The dunning letter would calculate the Overdue Days based on the days remaining to reach the Due Date.

The process is also described in KBA below.

2498448 - Dunning Letter Shows Different Behavior in the Overdue Days for not Overdue Items

https://me.sap.com/notes/2498448

entry.title: Re: Problem with ATP check in production
entry.content: Have a look at the 'Availability Overview' for the component in the prod. order: CO02, component overview, select component, 'component availability check', 'ATP quantities'. Like CO09. Is kind of MD04 from ATP point of view. Intended to help you understand the ATP situation. Attaching the 'Availability Overview' screen might help to  get more input from the community.

entry.title: Re: Clear open items in the Public Cloud from the Private...
entry.content:
Hello JP,

Thank you for your question.

After talking to the experts, I can provide the following answer: The feature you mentioned is neither available nor planned to be available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

You may request features on the Customer Influence Portal. We continuously review and prioritize feature requests based on customer feedback. 

Kind regards,

Anne

entry.title: Customized theme display UI not correct in the search help
entry.content:
Dear exports,

I am working on the customized theme designer, and create a new theme based on the sap_fiori_3. The search help work as expected in the theme designer preview, but the UI input controls display chaos when I open the real FPM application link.

I am sure I didn`t modify any CSS after created the new theme, it looks like only the standard theme works correctly, my custmized theme based on sap_belize, sap_horizon,sap_fiori_3 all of them have the same issues.

When I put the cusor on the company code input controll and click down， it`s strange that the controls moves and display on the top of the orignial postion, I cannot figure out why it happened. I also tried to compare between the standard CSS and cutomized CSS files, even it`s copyed from the standard CSS but they are not the same. 

The sap UI version is 758. It`s quite strange and I don`t know if you ever has the same issue. Please let me know if you have any idea or solutions, I will appreciate for anything your provide. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Streamlining Sustainability Reporting: Integrating SAP Green Ledger with SAP Group Reporting
entry.content: great blog and a fantastic integration story!

entry.title: SユーザにMFAが設定できない
entry.content:
BTPで認証に利用するSユーザに対し、多要素認証を設定したくMFAの指示に従いhttps://accounts.sap.comへアクセスし設定を行おうとしましたが、添付の通りパスワードリセット画面に遷移しサイトに記載のあるような画面は表示されません。設定方法をご教示ください。

また、下記の対応方法があればあれば合わせてご教示ください。

・管理者が各SユーザのMFA設定を有効化・無効化する方法

・管理者が各ユーザのMFA設定有無を確認する方法


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SユーザにMFAが設定できない
entry.content:
ご担当者様

いつもお世話になっております。

ご質問内容について以下インラインにて失礼いたします。

>BTPで認証に利用するSユーザに対し、多要素認証を設定したくMFAの指示に従いhttps://accounts.sap.comへアクセスし設定を行おうとしましたが、添付の通りパスワードリセット画面に遷移しサイトに記載のあるような画面は表示されません。設定方法をご教示ください。

＝＝＞大変恐れ入りますが、下記のKBAで記載されておりますように、
ユーザのMFA設定関連については、SAP IDS teamで専門的に対応しています。

KBA: 3053832 - How to contact SAP ID Service team for password and login assistance for SAP sites.
The SAP IDS team helps users with various password/login topics such as (but not limited to):

  • Multi-factor authentication (MFA)

このため、MFAについてご質問・サポートが必要な場合は、直接メールにて
SAP IDS team（sso@sap.com）へお問い合わせいただけますでしょうか。

＞・管理者が各SユーザのMFA設定を有効化・無効化する方法

＝＝＞現在の実装ではユーザ自身でのみMFAを有効化にすることができます。
残念ながら、管理者によってS-UserのMFA有効・無効化する方法はございません。

ご希望に沿った回答ができておらず大変申し訳ございません。

もし当該機能の追加をご希望される場合は、https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#にて
機能追加要求リクエストを提出していただくことをご検討いただけますでしょうか 

KBA：3156721 - How to give feedback or share ideas and requirements - SAP for Me

>・管理者が各ユーザのMFA設定有無を確認する方法

＝＝＞管理者権限ユーザでSAP for Me > ユーザ管理 にてユーザのMFA 設定有無をご確認いただけます。

詳細な確認方法について記載されているKBA をお送りいたしますので、
ご参考になれば幸いです。

3547171 - How administrators can view which S-users have already activated MFA - SAP for Me

SAPサポート
Judy

entry.title: Re: The Next Generation Intercompany Solution: Intercompany Matching & Reconciliation
entry.content:
Hi @RajeshGoyal, 

Regarding question 1: please look into the feature "temporary resolution": https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/7570a4b5e63c4103bf947b7b9454d1e1.html?version=2502.500 

Question 2: Are you using the "matching run" from Define Matching Methods? If the status remains in "Scheduled" for long, it might indicate your user doesn't have the authorization to initiate the matching run or release the job. You can check SM37 log or try "Schedule Matching Run Jobs" app.

Regards,

Grace

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning HUB
entry.content: I have the same issue and created a case on Jan 13 with the learning support team. It is now in Feb. I still do not have access.

entry.title: Re: Company Structure Configuration
entry.content:
Hi,

The marked positions are displayed twice because they belong to both the parent position and the department, hence the associations are displayed separately. This is expected behavior.

If you do not want child position to be shown under parent position, you can go to Company Structure Configuration-> find the company structure you want to modify->click on position and delete the child position under parent position.

If you want to keep the child position, then this behavior is expected. 

Hope this answers your question.

Best regards

Elsa Chen
Technical Support Engineer, PS People
SuccessFactors
SAP

entry.title: Re: Payment Wizard schedule
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you checked for Schedule a Payment Wizard Run the following:

1. the database is HANA.

2. Job service is setup for the Server and the database & is Running.

3. In Payment Wizard, the scheduling is done and date and time is defined.

Check the below blog

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/schedule-the-payment-wizard-run/ba-p/13419721

kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Which SAP Module to Choose?
entry.content: Hi, I am new to SAP world and I wonder which module should I focus to study as a functional consultant. I am an industrial engineering graduate but I am also considering the highest demand on SAP is FICO consultants.
